head.hi: The Acting Secretary of State to Ambassador Hengelmüller von Hengervar.

div.p: Excellency: I have the honor to acknowledge the receipt of your excellency’s note No. 1002, of the 10th ultimo, communicating your Government’s’ reply to the representations made by the American ambassador in Vienna regarding the complaint of Mrs. Maria Horniak, otherwise Hornyak, against the Hungarian authorities.

A copy of your excellency’s note has been communicated, in translated form, to the American ambassador in Vienna; also to the Secretary of Commerce and Labor, and to Mr. John Horniak, the husband of the complainant.
